name: libtimedate-perl
title: libtimedate-perl
summary: collection of modules to manipulate date/time information
description:
collection of modules to manipulate date/time information
TimeDate is a collection of Perl modules useful for manipulating date and
time information. Date::Parse can parse absolute date specifications in a
wide variety of input formats and many languages (via Date::Language).
.
This package also includes Date::Format, which can format dates into strings,
as well as Time::Zone, which contains miscellaneous time zone functions.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libtimedate-perl because collection of modules to manipulate date/time information.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libtimedate-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libtimedate-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libtimedate-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
